content:
🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Think about a story you’ve read or heard that stayed with you. What made it memorable?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If memories were physical objects, how would you describe the most important one you hold onto?


Day 4: Reflection & Course Feedback
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

What is one thing you have found helpful in this course so far? What is one thing you wish were different?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why is student feedback important in a learning environment? How do you think educators should incorporate student perspectives into course design?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Reflect on your learning experience this week. How has your understanding of writing changed since Day 1? What specific aspects of the course have been the most impactful for you?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:
context: From document: Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 — chunk 3 (chunk 3/19)
